name: nebula
description: 自建笔记系统 - NestJS + React + Electron

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.ci:backend: cd backend && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build && npm test -- --runInBand src/modules/note/note.service.spec.ts
scripts.ci:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run build
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run dist
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
